summary: Clean audience recording captures a high‑energy 85‑minute show highlighted by the opening “The Music Never Stopped” and a fiery jam after “Wheel”, with overall good sound quality.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance – the opener from The Music Never Stopped and an inspired post‑Wheel noodling get special mention – and praise the surprisingly clean audience tape. While it isn’t an SBD, the recording is clear enough to let the band’s high‑energy set shine, making it a solid listen for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed positive reviews (4 & 5 stars) highlight excellent performance and good‑to‑great audience sound; a third brief neutral note does not detract, yielding an overall rating in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, crisp audience tape with strong crowd reaction; not a soundboard (SBD) but still very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy 85‑minute set that opens with The Music Never Stopped and builds momentum into a memorable jam after Wheel; pacing keeps the crowd engaged throughout.
